_comment: Connection-manifest for the Graphics department. verify-wiring.sh reads this file and checks each required cfg_key. Advisory (required:false) entries are documentation-only hooks verify-wiring.sh reports but never gates on.

connection_points.name: gip-prompt-authoring-route
connection_points.description: Per decision GK-D2 (Presentation-mirror, Option A phased): every AI-image-generation prompt in this department is authored by the dedicated Prompt Author role (prompt-author-graphics.md) from the requesting role's creative brief, then independently graded by the Prompt QC Specialist (qc-specialist-prompt-graphics.md, judge != writer) BEFORE the Generation Operator's SOP-DIU-601 preflight ever sees it. No producing role self-authors or self-certifies its own final prompt text. Advisory (required:false) — this is a documentation hook, not a live cfg_key; wiring is enforced structurally (both role files must exist in this department + be registered in _index.json) and mechanically (diu_validator.py prompt-band + the Prompt-QC report), not via openclaw.json.

connection_points.name: kie-api-key
connection_points.description: Kie.ai API key for AI image generation used by graphics production roles.

connection_points.name: ghl-api-key
connection_points.description: GoHighLevel API key for uploading finished graphics assets to the GHL media library.

connection_points.name: ghl-location-id
connection_points.description: GHL location ID for targeting the correct media library sub-account.
